Off Calendar Jul-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Yunhua Gu, 808-742-3213 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other appearance.

Motion is not properly contested by Plaintiff. Court informs Plaintiff that the motion cannot be heard due to not providing proper notification to Court and counsel of his intent to appear and present argument.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT CHINESE HOSPITAL's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant's unopposed Demurrer to Plaintiff's Complaint is sustained with leave to amend. The complaint fails to state facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action and the allegations are time barred (CCP sections 430.10 and 340.5). Plaintiff must file an amended complaint within 30 days of the filing of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order/statement of decision which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling
